vocab.meaning: bắt đầu một thói quen/sở thích
vocab.example: I actually took up stamp collecting when I was only six years old after finding my grandfather's old album.

vocab.meaning: kiên trì, gắn bó lâu dài với cái gì
vocab.example: Although many of my friends changed their interests, I've stuck with playing chess for over fifteen years.

vocab.meaning: dần dần trở nên được yêu thích hơn (theo thời gian)
vocab.example: Classical piano didn't appeal to me at first, but it really grew on me as I practiced more throughout my teens.

vocab.meaning: trở nên hăng hái, bắt đầu say mê
vocab.example: I first got into photography using an old film camera, and that passion has only intensified over the years.

vocab.meaning: duy trì, tiếp tục làm gì đó
vocab.example: It's been challenging with a busy work schedule, but I try my best to keep up my drawing habit every weekend.

vocab.meaning: truyền lại (từ thế hệ trước sang thế hệ sau)
vocab.example: Gardening is a hobby that was passed down to me by my mother, and I’ve been nurturing my own plants since primary school.

vocab.meaning: tìm hiểu sâu, đi sâu nghiên cứu
vocab.example: Even as a young child, I loved to delve into historical encyclopedias, which sparked my lifelong interest in archaeology.

vocab.meaning: lên kế hoạch chi tiết (cho một hành trình hoặc dự án sở thích)
vocab.example: I used to spend hours mapping out imaginary worlds in my notebook, a hobby that eventually led me to become an illustrator.

vocab.meaning: cân nhắc, thử nghiệm nhẹ nhàng (ý tưởng hoặc công việc)
vocab.example: I initially just toyed with the idea of creative writing as a kid, but it soon evolved into a serious daily practice.

vocab.meaning: mải mê, đắm chìm hoàn toàn vào cái gì
vocab.example: Whenever I pick up a fantasy novel, I completely lose myself in the story, just as I did when I was ten.
